title.en: COMBINATION OR MULTI-PURPOSE TOOLS NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR; DETAILS OR COMPONENTS OF PORTABLE POWER-DRIVEN TOOLS NOT PARTICULARLY RELATED TO THE OPERATIONS PERFORMED AND NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR {(machines or arrangements of machines for performing specified combinations of different metal-working operations not covered by a single other subclass B23P23/00 and subgroups)}
Combination or multi-purpose hand tools (associations of tools for different working operations with one portable power-drive means B25F3/00; {combined stapling and punching tools B25C5/0214})
{of pliers'-, scissors'- or wrench-type with at least one movable jaw (B25F1/006 takes precedence)}
{with percussion tool-heads or -blades, e.g. hammers, axes}
with interchangeable or adjustable tool elements
Associations of tools for different working operations with one portable power-drive means; Adapters therefor
Details or components of portable power-driven tools not particularly related to the operations performed and not otherwise provided for
{Gearings, speed selectors, clutches or the like specially adapted for rotary tools}
{Stops for limiting depth in rotary hand tools (for drilling tools: B23B49/003)}
Construction of casings, bodies or handles {(B25F5/006, B25F5/008 take precedence)}
